title: festuca deserti subsp. aurasiaca
intro: Festuca deserti subsp. aurasiaca, also known as a type of fescue grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Spain, where it grows in well-drained soils. Festuca deserti subsp. aurasiaca has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate digestive issues and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations.
